findings.description: A large embedded image (width 598.3pt) is inserted mid-content between the table of contents and Section I heading. This appears to be a page-footer/separator element from the bottom of PDF page 1, placed into the HTML body flow rather than consolidated into a footer or removed. The agency contact information it likely contains is already rendered as text in the HTML header block.
findings.evidence:
HTML: appears between closing of table of contents and

. In the PDF, this corresponds to the footer bar at the bottom of page 1 containing 'State of North Carolina | Environmental Quality | Water Resources / 1611 Mail service Center | Raleigh, North Carolina 27699-1611 / 919 707 9000', which is already present as text in the HTML
.
